How does Bridge-To-Earn work?
1.
Bridge ETH

Bridge your ETH to get it ready for the ZKasino chain.

2.
Earn $ZKAS

Bridging your ETH earns you $ZKAS while you wait for the chain to go live.

3.
Bridge funds

At the end of the bridging period the chain will go live and your $ZKAS will be available on the chain to be used as the gas token.
Ethereum will be returned and can be bridged back at this point.
